MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD TRUE AROUND THE YEAR 2025 DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN TRANSISTOR MINIATURIZATION THAT PREVENT FURTHER DENSITY INCREASES ON SILICON CHIPS.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT STOP ENTIRELY BUT WILL EVOLVE THROUGH NEW MATERIALS LIKE GRAPHENE OR THREE DIMENSIONAL STACKING TO SUSTAIN PERFORMANCE GROWTH BEYOND THE TRADITIONAL TIMELINE.
MOORE
